hero.description: Join the largest community of antique banknote collectors. Explore unique pieces, share your collection and connect with experts from around the world.

featured.title: Exceptional
featured.subtitle: Explore our curated selection of the most valuable and unique banknotes from around the world. Every piece tells a story.

features.title: Everything You Need for
features.subtitle: Professional tools and a passionate community to take your collection to the next level.
features.authenticityDesc: Every banknote is verified by certified experts before being listed on our platform.
features.searchDesc: Find exactly what you're looking for with filters by country, year, denomination, condition and more.
features.communityDesc: Connect with collectors from over 85 countries. Share, learn and trade with experts.
features.valuationDesc: Access updated market prices to know the real value of your collection.
features.ctaDescription: Join for free and access over 120,000 banknotes from around the world. Your next piece is waiting for you.

testimonials.title: What Our
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of collectors trust us to find and authenticate their most precious pieces.

footer.description: The leading community for antique banknote collectors and notaphily.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get the latest news and exclusive offers.

carousel.title: Recently
carousel.subtitle: The last 100 banknotes added to our worldwide database.

search.title: Find Your
search.subtitle: Search among thousands of banknotes by country, year, currency and more filters.
search.noResults: No banknotes found with those filters.

detail.notFoundDesc: The banknote you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
detail.notForSaleDesc: There are currently no copies of this banknote for sale.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join the collectors community
signup.name: Name
signup.infoNote: Your account will be reviewed and activated by an administrator
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.genericError: Error creating account. Please try again.
signup.successMessage: We have sent a verification email to your address. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your email.
signup.successNote: Once verified, an administrator will activate your account and you will be able to log in.

verifyEmail.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been successfully verified.
verifyEmail.successNote: An administrator will review your account and activate it. You will get full access once activated.
verifyEmail.alreadyMessage: Your email has already been verified. If your account is not yet active, an administrator will activate it soon.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The verification link is invalid or has expired. If the problem persists, please contact the administrator.

myBanknotes.emptyDesc: Browse the catalog and mark banknotes as 'I have it' to get started.
